description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Brown wallet that has a flap style opening with a press buttoned closure Nine card holders, one transparent id card holder and two insert pockets on one side Three compartments and one press buttoned pocket on the other side Stitch detailing on the front with a buckle design A zipped pocket and branding on the back Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Size 21 cm x 11 cm
